2605.01605.title: Where Do Prompt Perturbations Break Generation? A Segment-Level View of Robustness in LoRA-Tuned Language Models
2605.01605.paper_summary: Large language models are sensitive to minor prompt perturbations, yet existing robustness methods usually enforce consistency at the whole-sequence level. This holistic view can hide an important failure mode: a perturbed response may remain globally similar to the clean one while drifting on a critical entity, relation, or conclusion. We introduce S$^2$R$^2$, a segment-level framework for robust LoRA fine-tuning. S$^2$R$^2$ decomposes clean and perturbed generations into semantic segments, aligns them with an optimal-transport objective, and penalises the segments with the largest meaning drift. To connect this output-side objective with model adaptation, we add an adapter-stability regulariser motivated by segment-level attention reallocation, using LoRA norm control as a tractable proxy for limiting perturbation-amplified evidence shifts. A PAC-Bayesian complexity view further explains why controlling adapter growth may support transfer beyond observed perturbations. Experiments on summarisation benchmarks show that S$^2$R$^2$ improves robustness under typographical noise, deletion, synonym replacement, and paraphrasing, while maintaining competitive clean performance and stronger cross-dataset transfer than consistency-based baselines.
2605.01605.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型對於微小的提示擾動非常敏感，但現有的穩健性方法通常在整個序列層面強制一致性。這種整體觀點可能隱藏了一個重要的失效模式：擾動的回應可能在整體上與乾淨的回應相似，但在關鍵實體、關係或結論上卻有所偏離。我們引入了S$^2$R$^2$，這是一個針對穩健LoRA微調的段落級框架。S$^2$R$^2$將乾淨和擾動的生成分解為語義段落，並通過最優運輸目標將它們對齊，同時懲罰意義漂移最大的段落。為了將這一輸出側目標與模型適應連接起來，我們添加了一個適配器穩定性正則化器，這是基於段落級注意力重新分配的動機，並使用LoRA範數控制作為限制擾動放大證據變化的可行代理。PAC-貝葉斯複雜度觀點進一步解釋了為什麼控制適配器增長可能支持超越觀察到的擾動的轉移。在摘要基準上的實驗顯示，S$^2$R$^2$在排版噪音、刪除、同義詞替換和改寫下提高了穩健性，同時保持了競爭力的乾淨性能，並且比基於一致性的基準在跨數據集轉移上更強。
2605.01605.author: Zhuoyun Li et.al.
2605.01605.authors: Zhuoyun Li, Boxuan Wang, Jinwei Hu, Zhenglin Huang, Qisong He, Xinmiao Huang, Guangliang Cheng, Xiaowei Huang, Yi Dong
